References

Retained versions of the site that are no longer live at the root. This keeps the current main site clean while preserving the iterations worth revisiting.

Version 4

The pioneer to the current site, with the same atmospheric direction in a less detailed pass.

Former Root Site

The previous main homepage before `/1` was promoted to root.

Version 2

The brutalist glitch direction with the strongest editorial edge.

Version 3

The restrained atmospheric concept with floating panel choreography.
